forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then turning east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then turning easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day then turning southerly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Possible small hail in the south in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning southerly in the early afternoon then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
High
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and early afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day then turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 21.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Hawker in the late morning and early afternoon. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 20 to 25.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
